name: creator-ugc-marketing
description: When the user wants to plan, brief, source, or measure organic creator / influencer / UGC marketing for their app — including TikTok creators, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, micro-influencers, paid creator briefs, UGC ad creative for Meta/TikTok, affiliate programs, and seeding strategy. Use when the user mentions "creators", "influencers", "TikTok marketing", "UGC", "user-generated content", "creator briefs", "creator outreach", "influencer marketing", "Reels", "Shorts", "creator gifting", "s
author: Eronred
summary_zh: 专为应用推广打造的达人营销与UGC管理工具，帮你一站式搞定从找达人、定策略到看效果的全流程，适合需要在社交平台做网红营销或收集用户原创素材的场景。
